channel.title: Blog on nico-series
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on nico-series

item.title: Update 2026
item.description:
Hi all!

If this is the most recent post you’re seeing, you’ll note that most of my activity on this blog occurred a little over a year ago. It consisted of setup, theming, and 3/4 of the posts are about food.

During the intervening time frame, I’ve moved a few times, studied, worked a few short jobs, and immigrated to Canada! I’m currently a little more settled, with quite a lot of time to continue working on my skills, career, and this blog, so expect to hear from me a lot more. I’ve got a number of ideas cooking concerning documenting my forays into the following topics:
